changeSet.author: qais
qais

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE social_history DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS ck_social_history_previous_smoker_required;

changeSet.author: qais

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE social_history DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS ck_social_history_smoker_xor;

changeSet.author: qais

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE social_history DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS ck_social_history_alcohol_since_when_required;
